text:
Created attachment 148412
games/tome4: 1.2.3 -> 1.2.4

Please update games/tome4 to 1.2.4.

Changelog: http://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2014/10/news/tales-majeyal-124-aka-where-there-was-fire-released

Not obvious from changelog, but this includes oodles of fixes, graphical updates, paperdolls, etc. including a complete rework of celestials, chronomancers (Paradox Mage, Temporal Warden), Mindslayers, and more!

This version will also allow installation of the upcoming expansion pack.

I'm attaching poudriere testport log also.
